message:
🐛 Fix GA4 Realtime double-counting and deployment_type accuracy (#2184)

Three fixes for GA4 Realtime accuracy:

1. Pass our custom client_id to gtag('config') so GA4 uses the same
   identity as the proxy fallback. Without this, gtag.js creates its
   own _ga cookie client ID — GA4 sees two different users for the
   same person, inflating active user counts.

2. Queue events while waiting for gtag.js to load instead of sending
   them via the proxy immediately. This prevents the dual-path window
   where events could go through both the proxy (custom CID) and
   gtag (GA4 CID), creating duplicate users.

3. Use explicit gtag('set', 'user_properties', ...) instead of passing
   user_properties in the config call. This ensures deployment_type
   and other user-scoped dimensions propagate correctly to GA4
   Realtime reports, distinguishing localhost from console.kubestellar.io.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
